title: periclymenum sempervirens
intro: Periclymenum sempervirens, also known as the Woodland Rose or Wild Jasmine, is a flowering plant native to Europe and Western Asia. The medicinal properties of this plant come from its leaves, flowers, and stems, which contain flavonoids and iridoid glycosides that have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Periclymenum sempervirens include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and easing symptoms of menopausal hot flashes, as well as exhibiting anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
